title: FullStory vs Heap
description: Compare FullStory vs Heap in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right analytics & data tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, FullStory emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.2/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, FullStory or Heap?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, FullStory edges ahead with a 4.2/5 rating. FullStory excels at FullStory is a analytics & data platform that helps Product Managers and UX Rese, while Heap is stronger for Digital insights platform with auto-captured product analytics..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between FullStory and Heap?
faqs.answer: FullStory and Heap differ in pricing ($99/mo vs $5k-10k/yr), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is FullStory cheaper than Heap?
faqs.answer: FullStory starts at $99/mo while Heap starts at $5k-10k/yr. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, FullStory or Heap?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for analytics & data. FullStory scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use FullStory and Heap together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, FullStory or Heap?
faqs.answer: Both FullStory and Heap prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which analytics & data tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Heap for large teams, while FullStory may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $99/mo pricing.
